response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive senior-level software engineering experience, strong technical leadership, and direct exposure to AI agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP), a critical gap exists in the required 8+ years of experience specifically building production-grade AI solutions. Furthermore, the resume lacks proficiency in Python and explicit knowledge of vector databases and RAG architectures, which are essential for this GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) in senior/staff-level software development.
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and commitment to software quality.
concerns: Limited direct experience (6 months) building production-grade AI solutions, falling short of the 8+ year requirement.
No demonstrated proficiency in Python, a core language for AI development.
Lack of explicit knowledge regarding vector databases and RAG architectures.
